Agreement

I, {{ doc.employee_name }}, hereby acknowledge that I have received the Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) listed above.

I understand and agree to the following:

  • The PPE issued to me remains the property of the company.
  • I am responsible for the proper use, care, and safekeeping of the PPE issued to me.
  • The PPE will be replaced on or before the indicated re-issue date, subject to normal wear and tear.
  • If the PPE is lost, damaged due to negligence, or not returned when required, I may be held liable for the replacement cost.
  • I agree to comply with all safety policies and procedures relating to the use of PPE.

By signing below, I confirm that I understand and accept these conditions.
